rticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"受到治疗效果提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"受到的治疗效果"},{"text":"+10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.c824ad3488246","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/530081.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础属性提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础攻击力、防御力和生命值提升"},{"text":"5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.e7d0741f09395","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/364402.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果抵抗提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果抵抗"},{"text":"+12%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/207704.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害双向提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害结果提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害结果降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【千明的旋律。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"自幼内向孤僻的小女孩千明，在最近的生日晚宴上得到了一把小提琴。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"据我了解，在千明很小很小的时候，她就梦想有一天能得到这样一把小提琴——外观优美，音色典雅，演奏起来仿佛能使乐谱化为流光的音符。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"令人遗憾的是，幼年的千明从不肯在人前表演，但只要关上房门，她就能演奏出极为华丽的旋律。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"为此，千明的养父母费了很大的功夫，希望她能够克服自我，站上舞台。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但依然无济于事。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"——麦琪的异格者观察日记·千明的旋律"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【千明的激励。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"为了帮助她克服这样的心理，风见一宵自告奋勇以她为核心，创办了十三区高校的音乐社团。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但千明依旧不愿与外人相处，也鲜少出席社团的活动。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"为了说服她参与音乐社团的演出，风见一宵可谓是用尽苦心。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但千明似乎仍不能克服自己的内心恐惧，直到某天十三区高校意外遭受了袭击。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"具体的细节不在此页赘述，但可以记录的是，千明用小提琴激励了很多人的异格力量，就连总被说不成器的炀也不例外。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"受到激励的异格者们很快反制了袭击的暴徒们，千明也因此被誉为英雄，被崇拜她的学妹学弟们称为「幻音千明」。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这件事情，成为了她改变的契机。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"——麦琪的异格者观察日记·千明的激励"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【千明的独奏。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"经历了那场意外后，千明的确开朗了许多。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她开始试着在音乐社团的下午集会上为同学们演奏，与大家交流音乐和创作。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"上周，千明邀请协会的大家前去观看她的小提琴独奏会—一那场独奏会在十三区高校的礼拜堂举行，现场座无虚席。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"还有后来的观众站在角落里，安静地欣赏到结束。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"印象里，我从未见过这样光芒四射的千明，在场的每个人都感受到了自内心而发的激励。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"我相信，只要有人一直倾听，千明就会一直、一直这样演奏下去。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"终有一日，她会成为人群中最为闪耀的存在。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"——麦琪的异格者观察日记·千明的独奏"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.72bd40e80e7b58","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"拉条，增益"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 555|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性3生命加成 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"有着不错的拉条以及免疫推条，适合配合狐狸，炼等高需求buff的角色"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.60271ecc09273","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12疾驰+8戍卫+6极影强袭"}]}]}},{"key":"0.df78cb79e80b28","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"万魔法典"}]}]}}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_283/h_300/50364/842288/2025/7/18/524698.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"VwNdqj7LSlEAQoL9","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
